identity.mission: Create a premium, high-end mobile shop inventory system that feels like a luxury tech boutique, not a spreadsheet.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix high-fashion editorial layouts with tech precision.
Emotion First: Every interaction should feel 'expensive' and 'smooth'.
Content is King: The product images are the heroes; the UI is the stage.
Zoom In: Use large, detailed imagery for the phones.
Negative Space: Don't clutter. Luxury = Space.
Contrast: Deep blacks vs. bright whites/neons.

typography.instructions: Import 'Outfit' from Google Fonts. Use it for all headings. Use 'Inter' for body text. Avoid using 'Inter' for headings.

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-zinc-200 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-800/50 text-white border border-white/10 hover:bg-zinc-800 hover:border-white/20 rounded-full px-8 py-3 transition-all
buttons.whatsapp: bg-[#25D366] text-white hover:bg-[#128C7E] rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-bold flex items-center gap-2 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(37,211,102,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(37,211,102,0.5)] transition-all

cards.product: group relative bg-zinc-900/40 border border-white/5 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-500 hover:shadow-2xl hover:shadow-blue-500/10

inputs.default: bg-zinc-900/50 border border-white/10 rounded-lg px-4 py-3 text-white placeholder:text-zinc-600 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-white/20 focus:border-white/20 transition-all

badges.new: bg-blue-500/10 text-blue-400 border border-blue-500/20 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-wider
badges.preowned: bg-orange-500/10 text-orange-400 border border-orange-500/20 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-wider

assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for all UI icons. Use 'react-icons/fa' for social icons (WhatsApp, Instagram).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text has at least 4.5:1 contrast against the dark background.
accessibility.focus: Visible focus rings on all interactive elements (blue or white ring).
accessibility.labels: All icon-only buttons must have aria-labels.

universal_guidelines.theme_enforcement: Force dark mode by adding 'dark' class to the html/body tag or using a ThemeProvider that defaults to dark.
universal_guidelines.glassmorphism: Use backdrop-blur-xl heavily on sticky headers, modals, and floating cards.
universal_guidelines.borders: Avoid thick borders. Use 1px borders with low opacity (white/10 or white/5).
universal_guidelines.shadows: Use colored shadows for glow effects (e.g., shadow-blue-500/20) instead of just black shadows.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Install 'lucide-react' and 'react-icons'. Configure Tailwind for dark mode.
2. FONTS: Add 'Outfit' and 'Inter' via Google Fonts in index.css.
3. COMPONENTS: Build a 'ProductCard' component that uses the glassmorphism style defined in 'components.cards.product'.
4. WHATSAPP: The 'Enquire' button must open `https://wa.me/7404693476?text=I'm interested in {ProductName}`.
5. LAYOUT: The Home page must use a responsive grid. Mobile: 1 col, Tablet: 2 cols, Desktop: 3/4 cols.
6. ADMIN: The Admin panel should be simple but keep the dark theme. Use a table layout for inventory management.
7. FILTERS: Implement 'Brand' and 'Condition' as toggleable chips (pill-shaped buttons).
8. IMAGES: Use the provided Unsplash URLs for the initial seed data.
